title: FormulaCondition
description: FormulaCondition: Condition that verifies an object based on a given formula.

Inputs.description:
Initial values to be extracted from the verified object.
Keys are the names of variables to be used in the calculations.
Values are value sources to extract the values from.

CalculationFormulae.description:
Formulae to calculate the variables to be verified in the verification formula.
Formulae can be chained, i.e. one calculated variable can be derived from the previously calculated ones.
Keys are the names of variables to be used in the calculations.
Values are the formulae correspondent to each given variable name.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
